0.npc_text: Spare a coin? Just one coin... I need my fix...

player_choices.text: Any way to make copper around here?
You mentioned a place men fight for copper.

jace_work.npc_text: Copper? In the slums? You beg, steal, carry crates, or bleed for it. Depends what part of you still works.

jace_pit_unlock.npc_text: There's a cellar pit past the firepit by the south wall. Small crowd. Bad air. Copper on the line. They only let in men who know to keep their mouths shut and their fists ready.

jace_pit_unlock_2.npc_text: Bring copper if you want to look serious. No blades. No whining. If they like the look of you, they'll let you in.

jace_pit_repeat.npc_text: South wall. Past the firepit and the broken drain. Same hole in the ground, same bad smell. Try not to get your teeth kicked in.

jace_talk.npc_text: Bless you! Bless you! The lady at the Hovel... she has the good stuff. The BEST stuff. But only at night... shhh.

jace_secret.npc_text: Yes, yes! She sells to us... keeps us warm... don't tell the guards! She'll stop selling!

jace_thanks.npc_text: Bless you... bless you... that'll keep me warm tonight.
